description: Test Coverage Relevance: Assess whether tests verify changed behavior.

fixtures.notes: A new integration test is added, but it only validates a happy-path bean retrieval and does not assert the changed missing-bean-name fallback behavior or new property autowire branch.
Core dump_all behavior is changed to dedupe schemas across configs, but the test delta is only helper include churn and adds no assertions for the new branch behavior.

dump_schema execution is refactored to use with_temporary_pool and connection-scoped schema version writes, while test changes remain setup-only with no assertion coverage for the altered execution path.
